signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Emerges as Top Contender for Fed Chair Amid Surging Inflation and Rate Hike Speculation | NO | HIGH confidence**

No formal confirmation, announcement, or resolution has occurred regarding Kevin Warsh's Fed chair nomination, South Korea-related developments, or immediate Fed policy shifts that would directly move prediction markets right now.[1][2][3][4] Recent reports speculate Warsh
matched_markets: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair by May 15?
Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
